sqlMap.select: SELECT p.product_id AS PRODUCT_ID, p.name AS NAME, p.category AS CATEGORY, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) AS REVENUE, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) * 100 / (SELECT SUM(oi2.qty * oi2.unit_price) FROM order_item oi2 JOIN orders o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.order_id WHERE o2.status = 2) AS REVENUE_PCT, CASE WHEN SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) >= 200000 THEN 'STAR' WHEN SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) >= 50000 THEN 'STRONG' ELSE 'LONGTAIL' END AS TIER FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, p.category ORDER BY REVENUE DESC LIMIT #topN#

SELECT m.member_id AS MEMBER_ID, m.name AS NAME, m.grade AS GRADE, SUM(o.total_price) AS TOTAL_SPEND, COUNT(o.order_id) AS ORDER_CNT FROM member m JOIN orders o ON o.member_id = m.member_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY m.member_id, m.name, m.grade HAVING SUM(o.total_price) > (SELECT AVG(t.member_total) FROM (SELECT SUM(o2.total_price) AS member_total FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.status = 2 GROUP BY o2.member_id) t) ORDER BY TOTAL_SPEND DESC

SELECT COALESCE(p.category, 'UNCATEGORIZED') AS CATEGORY, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS ORDER_CNT, SUM(oi.qty) AS UNITS, SUM(oi.qty * oi.unit_price) AS REVENUE, CASE WHEN SUM(oi.qty) >= 10 THEN 'HIGH_VOLUME' WHEN SUM(oi.qty) >= 3 THEN 'MID_VOLUME' ELSE 'LOW_VOLUME' END AS VOLUME_TIER FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY COALESCE(p.category, 'UNCATEGORIZED') ORDER BY REVENUE DESC

SELECT 'PAID' AS STATUS_LABEL, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS GROSS FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 2 UNION ALL SELECT CASE o.status WHEN 0 THEN 'CREATED' WHEN 1 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OTHER' END AS STATUS_LABEL, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS GROSS FROM orders o WHERE o.status <> 2 GROUP BY CASE o.status WHEN 0 THEN 'CREATED' WHEN 1 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 3 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OTHER' END ORDER BY STATUS_LABEL

SELECT p.product_id AS PRODUCT_ID, p.name AS NAME, COALESCE(p.category, 'UNCATEGORIZED') AS CATEGORY, p.status AS STATUS, p.price AS PRICE, CASE WHEN p.status = 'DISCONTINUED' THEN 'DEAD_STOCK' ELSE 'NEW_OR_IDLE' END AS FLAG FROM product p WHERE p.product_id NOT IN ( SELECT po.product_id FROM order_item oi JOIN product_option po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id) ORDER BY p.product_id

SELECT c.discount_type AS DISCOUNT_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUPONS, SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS USED_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS USE_RATE_PCT, COALESCE(AVG(c.discount_val), 0) AS AVG_DISCOUNT_VAL, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) >= 50 THEN 'EFFECTIVE' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'PARTIAL' ELSE 'UNUSED' END AS EFFECTIVENESS FROM coupon c GROUP BY c.discount_type HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY USE_RATE_PCT DESC

SELECT s.MEMBER_ID, s.NAME, s.GRADE, s.TOTAL_SPEND, (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(t.spend), 0) FROM (SELECT o2.member_id AS mid, SUM(o2.total_price) AS spend FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.status = 2 GROUP BY o2.member_id) t JOIN member m2 ON m2.member_id = t.mid WHERE m2.grade = s.GRADE) AS GRADE_AVG_SPEND, CASE WHEN s.TOTAL_SPEND >= (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(t.spend),0) FROM (SELECT o3.member_id AS mid, SUM(o3.total_price) AS spend FROM orders o3 WHERE o3.status = 2 GROUP BY o3.member_id) t JOIN member m3 ON m3.member_id = t.mid WHERE m3.grade = s.GRADE) THEN 'ABOVE_GRADE_AVG' ELSE 'BELOW_GRADE_AVG' END AS BENCHMARK FROM (SELECT m.member_id AS MEMBER_ID, m.name AS NAME, m.grade AS GRADE, SUM(o.total_price) AS TOTAL_SPEND FROM member m JOIN orders o ON o.member_id = m.member_id WHERE o.status = 2 GROUP BY m.member_id, m.name, m.grade) s ORDER BY s.GRADE, s.TOTAL_SPEND DESC

SELECT fc.cohort_month AS COHORT_MONTH, COUNT(*) AS COHORT_SIZE, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.member_id=fc.member_id AND o2.status=2 AND LEFT(o2.order_date,6) > fc.cohort_month) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RETAINED_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o3 WHERE o3.member_id=fc.member_id AND o3.status=2 AND LEFT(o3.order_date,6) > fc.cohort_month) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100/COUNT(*) AS RETENTION_PCT FROM (SELECT o.member_id, MIN(LEFT(o.order_date,6)) AS cohort_month FROM orders o WHERE o.status=2 GROUP BY o.member_id) fc GROUP BY fc.cohort_month ORDER BY fc.cohort_month

SELECT p.product_id AS PRODUCT_ID, p.name AS NAME, COALESCE(p.category,'UNCATEGORIZED') AS CATEGORY, SUM(CASE WHEN il.reason='ORDER' THEN -il.change_qty ELSE 0 END) AS UNITS_SOLD, SUM(CASE WHEN il.reason='RESTOCK' THEN il.change_qty ELSE 0 END) AS UNITS_RESTOCKED, SUM(il.change_qty) AS NET_FLOW, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN il.reason='ORDER' THEN -il.change_qty ELSE 0 END) >= 10 THEN 'FAST_MOVER' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN il.reason='ORDER' THEN -il.change_qty ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 'SLOW_MOVER' ELSE 'STAGNANT' END AS TURNOVER_TIER FROM inventory_log il JOIN product_option po ON il.option_id = po.option_id JOIN product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name, COALESCE(p.category,'UNCATEGORIZED') HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN il.reason='ORDER' THEN -il.change_qty ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY UNITS_SOLD DESC

SELECT 'COUPON' AS SOURCE, c.discount_type AS DISCOUNT_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS DEF_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn='N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OPEN_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(c.discount_val),0) AS TOTAL_FLAT_OR_RATE, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.used_yn='Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'NONE_REDEEMED' ELSE 'SOME_REDEEMED' END AS REDEMPTION_STATE FROM coupon c GROUP BY c.discount_type UNION ALL SELECT 'PROMOTION' AS SOURCE, pr.discount_type AS DISCOUNT_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS DEF_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN pr.status='ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OPEN_CNT, COALESCE(SUM(pr.discount_val),0) AS TOTAL_FLAT_OR_RATE, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pr.status='ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'ALL_ENDED' ELSE 'HAS_ACTIVE' END AS REDEMPTION_STATE FROM promotion pr GROUP BY pr.discount_type ORDER BY SOURCE, DISCOUNT_TYPE

SELECT p.product_id AS PRODUCT_ID, p.name AS NAME, COUNT(r.review_id) AS REVIEW_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN r.rating=5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAR5, SUM(CASE WHEN r.rating=4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAR4, SUM(CASE WHEN r.rating=3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAR3, SUM(CASE WHEN r.rating=2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAR2, SUM(CASE WHEN r.rating=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAR1, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating),0) AS AVG_RATING, CASE WHEN COALESCE(AVG(r.rating),0) >= 4 THEN 'LOVED' WHEN COALESCE(AVG(r.rating),0) >= 3 THEN 'MIXED' ELSE 'AT_RISK' END AS SENTIMENT FROM product p JOIN review r ON r.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name HAVING COUNT(r.review_id) > 0 ORDER BY AVG_RATING DESC, REVIEW_CNT DESC

SELECT p.product_id AS PRODUCT_ID, p.name AS NAME, p.status AS STATUS FROM product p WHERE p.status='ON_SALE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM review r WHERE r.product_id = p.product_id) ORDER BY p.product_id
